sourcesContent:
// src/utils/defaultProducts.js

export const defaultProducts = [
  {
    _id: "default-1",
    name: "ABB ACS580 Variable Frequency Drive",
    price: 245000,
    unit: "unit",
    category: "motors",
    stock: 12,
    minOrderQty: 1,
    rating: 4.8,
    reviewCount: 142,
    views: 1200,
    isRestricted: false,
    supplier: { name: "ABB Industrial", company: "ABB India" },
    images: ["/images/aaa.jpg"],   // put image in public/images/
    description: "High performance industrial VFD drive.",
    specifications: {
      Power: "0.75-250 kW",
      Voltage: "380-480V",
      Control: "DTC / Scalar"
    },
    tags: ["VFD", "Motor", "Drive"]
  },
  {
    _id: "default-2",
    name: "Siemens S7-1500 PLC",
    price: 380000,
    unit: "unit",
    category: "electronics",
    stock: 8,
    minOrderQty: 1,
    rating: 4.9,
    reviewCount: 203,
    views: 980,
    isRestricted: false,
    supplier: { name: "Siemens", company: "Siemens India" },
    images: ["/images/bbb.jpg"],
    description: "Advanced PLC for automation systems.",
    specifications: {
      CPU: "1515-2 PN",
      Memory: "500 KB",
      IO: "32 DI / 32 DO"
    },
    tags: ["PLC", "Automation"]
  }
];
